query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the findings:

## Bottom Line

**On the çağrı heyeti application:** Özgür Özel's CHP faction is reported to have moved to file (or be about to file) an application to a **Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi (Civil Court of Peace)** requesting appointment of a **çağrı heyeti (call committee)** around **June 29–30, 2026** — after the Kılıçdaroğlu-led administration refused to act on 833 delegate signatures submitted June 17 (10-day deadline expired ~June 27). However, the reporting is **inconsistent**: some outlets said the filing happened June 29; a June 30 Sözcü report said the team would apply "in the shortest time" (not yet filed); and Türkiye Gazetesi cited a **July 11** target.

**On a court decision:** **No court has issued any decision** on the application as of the latest available reporting (July 1, 2026). Every source treats it as pending/prospective.

**On the Civil Code Art. 75 / 3-person framing:** The mechanism described (Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi + çağrı heyeti) is exactly what Turkish Civil Code Article 75 provides — a court appoints three members to form a call committee when governing organs fail to convene. But **none of the retrieved news sources explicitly cited "Article 75" or the "3-person" number** verbatim; those are the correct statutory description rather than confirmed quotes.

**Notable caveats for forecasting:**
- Source inconsistencies on court type (Sulh Hukuk vs. Asliye Hukuk), filing date (June 29 vs. July 11), and relief (çağrı heyeti vs. "kayyum").
- A **judicial recess begins July 20**, which could delay proceedings.
- If granted, the extraordinary congress must be held within 45 days; Özel's camp has a "Plan B" (new party/merger).
- Kılıçdaroğlu is instead pursuing an **ordinary congress in September** and dismissing pro-Özel provincial chairs (36+ by July 1).

sources.title: CHP bugün mahkemelik oluyor
sources.snippet: Özel's team filing lawsuit June 29 2026 with Ankara Civil Court of Peace requesting appointment of a call committee; congress must be held within 45 days of court decision.

sources.title: Kurultay olmazsa yeni parti
sources.snippet: Özel team to apply to Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi 'in the shortest time' for a call committee; judicial recess July 20 could interrupt; Plan B new party.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi büyüyor! Özel'in ekibi bugün mahkemeye gidiyor
sources.snippet: Faction backed by 833 delegates petitions Ankara sulh hukuk mahkemesi to appoint a call committee; if granted, extraordinary congress within 45 days.

sources.title: Kılıçdaroğlu harekete geçti! Belediye başkanlarına kötü haber
sources.snippet: Özel faction led by MP Süleyman Bülbül plans to file lawsuit with Asliye Hukuk Mahkemesi to demand a call committee after leadership refused to process 833 signatures.

sources.title: CHP adliye koridorlarına hapsoldu! Kurultay da ihraçlar da mahkemelik olacak
sources.snippet: Özel faction plans to file lawsuit July 11 with Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi requesting court-appointed administrator (kayyum); congress scheduled for July 26.

sources.title: Butlan yönetiminin illere gönderdiği yazılar, olumsuz yanıtlar alıyor
sources.snippet: Concerns within CHP that an extraordinary congress organized via a 'çağrı heyeti' (call committee), as with the MHP historically, could be annulled by a court.

sources.title: CHP milletvekillerinden kurultay çağrısı. '12 Temmuz'da toplanmalı'
sources.snippet: 111 CHP MPs led by Özel called for an extraordinary congress on July 12, 2026, warning failure to convene by July 25 risks election ineligibility.

sources.title: Kılıçdaroğlu'ndan dokunulmazlık ve yeni anayasa mesajı
sources.snippet: Kılıçdaroğlu says extraordinary congress impossible due to court rulings; a regular congress will be held within four to five months (i.e., September).

sources.title: Kılıçdaroğlu'ndan örgüte neşter! Görevden alınan il başkanı sayısı 36'ya ulaştı
sources.snippet: Since the May 21 absolute nullity decision, total provincial chairs dismissed by Kılıçdaroğlu administration reached 36 as of July 1, 2026.

data_points.metric: Delegate signatures submitted for extraordinary congress
Deadline given to Kılıçdaroğlu administration to convene congress after signature submission
Maximum period to hold extraordinary congress after a court grants call committee
CHP MPs who signed call for July 12 extraordinary congress
Provincial chairs dismissed by Kılıçdaroğlu administration since May 21 nullity ruling
